title: Prepare and despatch meat products
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Prepare and despatch meat products demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Identify product required for meat product orders

pcs.text: Identify and label products in accordance with trade descriptions1.2 Identify products in accordance with company requirements
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify and label products in accordance with trade descriptions1.2 Identify products in accordance with company requirements?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify and label products in accordance with trade descriptions1.2 Identify products in accordance with company requirements.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E1: Identify product required for meat product orders

elements.title: Check customer requirements for delivery of order

pcs.text: Confirm customer requirements to determine product order delivery arrangements2.2 Check customer requirements to confirm whether the order is domestic or export so as to comply with appropriate regulatory and importing country requirements2.3 Confirm temperature and storage requirements for product order and arrange in accordance with workplace requirements
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Confirm customer requirements to determine product order delivery arrangements2.2 Check customer requirements to confirm whether the order is domestic or export so as to comply with appropriate regulatory and importing country requirements2.3 Confirm temperature and storage requirements for product order and arrange in accordance with workplace requirements?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Confirm customer requirements to determine product order delivery arrangements2.2 Check customer requirements to confirm whether the order is domestic or export so as to comply with appropriate regulatory and importing country requirements2.3 Confirm temperature and storage requirements for product order and arrange in accordance with workplace requirements.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E2: Check customer requirements for delivery of order

elements.title: Arrange orders

pcs.text: Identify products for an order and confirm chiller location3.2 Assemble product and check against documentation to ensure correct order is sent out3.3 Prepare meat orders in accordance with workplace health and safety, hygiene and sanitation, Quality Assurance (QA) and regulatory requirements3.4 Identify cartons and/or carcases unsuitable for loadout and take appropriate action
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify products for an order and confirm chiller location3.2 Assemble product and check against documentation to ensure correct order is sent out3.3 Prepare meat orders in accordance with workplace health and safety, hygiene and sanitation, Quality Assurance (QA) and regulatory requirements3.4 Identify cartons and/or carcases unsuitable for loadout and take appropriate action?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify products for an order and confirm chiller location3.2 Assemble product and check against documentation to ensure correct order is sent out3.3 Prepare meat orders in accordance with workplace health and safety, hygiene and sanitation, Quality Assurance (QA) and regulatory requirements3.4 Identify cartons and/or carcases unsuitable for loadout and take appropriate action.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E3: Arrange orders

elements.title: Complete documentation

pcs.text: Correctly complete despatch documentation either manually or electronically to workplace and regulatory requirements

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Correctly complete despatch documentation either manually or electronically to workplace and regulatory requirements.
